testcase.name: test_learn_products_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Learn products failed: 502 assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_cloudinary_endpoints.py:33: in test_learn_products_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Learn products failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Learn products failed: 502 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cleanup_duplicate_services_requires_password

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing password, got: 502 assert 502 == 422 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_cloudinary_endpoints.py:150: in test_cleanup_duplicate_services_requires_password assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for missing password, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing password, got: 502 E assert 502 == 422 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cleanup_duplicate_services_valid

failure.message:
AssertionError: Cleanup failed: 502, The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_cloudinary_endpoints.py:163: in test_cleanup_duplicate_services_valid assert response.status_code == 200, f"Cleanup failed: {response.status_code}, {response.text}" E AssertionError: Cleanup failed: 502, The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

failure.message:

assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
